expectations.evidence: 33 KWCAG items + 7 semantic HTML items all present in CSV

expectations.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
expectations.evidence: A-10: ❌ StatsCard.tsx:10-17 — div onClick without tabIndex/role/onKeyDown

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id='stat-card' when rendered in a list
expectations.evidence: A-32: ❌ StatsCard.tsx:12 — id='stat-card' 하드코딩, 3회 렌더링 시 중복

expectations.text: Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
expectations.evidence: All items numbered 1-33 plus semantic items

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: 수정 가이드 column populated for all fail/advisory items

expectations.text: Lighthouse-mapped items show verdict method as Lighthouse
expectations.evidence: Most items show 정적분석. A-25: Lighthouse via reference. Dashboard auth redirect prevented direct Lighthouse verification of StatsCard.

expectations.text: Playwright-target items (A-10) show verdict method as Playwright
expectations.evidence: A-10: 정적분석 (not Playwright). Dashboard auth prevented browser access to StatsCard component.
